hero.lead_html: I'm an Azure Solutions Lead at SoftServe. 13+ years turning chaotic cloud environments into calm ones — Azure-first, multi-cloud aware. I help teams design platforms they can leave alone for a week without things catching fire.
hero.blurb: A logbook for cloud, automation and AI — plus a corner for the music I make outside work.

bento.now_body: CI/CD assessments · pre-sales · Microsoft Advanced Specializations · live-coding music in Strudel.

cases.title: Problems solved in production.
cases.label: Case studies
cases.case1_body: Designed and migrated a 40-service estate to an enterprise landing zone — hub-and-spoke, Policy-as-Code, unified monitoring. Delivered in 8 weeks.
cases.case2_body: Replaced a legacy Jenkins cluster with GitHub Actions + Azure DevOps, added quality gates, and automated IaC drift detection. Zero outages for 6 months.
cases.case3_body: Rolled out Claude-based internal tooling — codebase Q&A, IaC generator, incident summariser — across a 60-engineer team. 4-week engagement.
cases.case4_body: Implemented tagging taxonomy, right-sizing automation, and reserved-instance strategy across Azure + AWS. Ongoing cost anomaly alerting keeps savings compounding.

teasers.label: Services
teasers.cloud_body: Landing zones, migrations, well-architected reviews — Azure-first, multi-cloud aware.
teasers.devops_body: Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Bicep. Pipelines that survive Mondays.
teasers.ai_body: Practical use of Claude / Copilot, custom skills, internal AI tooling — without losing taste.

about.label: About
about.title: Architect by day, automator by evening, live-coder at night.
about.lead: I'm an Azure Solutions Lead at SoftServe with 13+ years across cloud architecture, DevOps and platform engineering. Quiet, methodical, allergic to ceremony.
about.voice: I write the way I work — in plain language, with the boring details kept in. The goal is always to make complex platforms feel calm.

services.label: Services
services.title: Three ways to work together.
services.lead: Short engagements work best — a single review, a focused workshop, a 2-week scoping sprint. For deeper involvement let's chat first and shape it together.
services.tier_free_desc: 30 minutes to understand your problem. I'll tell you honestly if I can help — and what the smallest useful next step is.
services.tier_review_desc: A 2-week deep dive into your architecture — I assess risks, document findings, and hand you a prioritised action plan you can act on immediately.
services.tier_embed_desc: Part-time fractional CTA for teams that need ongoing cloud leadership without a full-time hire.
services.cta_body: Send a paragraph about what you're working on. I'll suggest the smallest possible engagement that actually helps.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Things I've built or led.
projects.lead: A mix of client work, open-source contributions, and personal experiments. Most cloud, some music, occasional silliness.

writing.label: Writing
writing.title: Notes on the things I keep learning.
writing.lead: Three rough series — cloud architecture, AI-first engineering, and the operational side of automation.
writing.uk_only_notice: Posts are currently in English only — translations are coming.

music.label: Music
music.title: Live-coding sounds at the edge of the work week.
music.lead: Strudel REPL on Friday evenings — small algorithmic patches, mostly ambient, some glitch. Recorded on SoundCloud.
music.carol_caption: Mykola Leontovych's 1916 Ukrainian carol "Shchedryk" — live-coded as glockenspiel bells over piano bass and euclidean-rhythm guitar comping. Press play in the editor below. Any edits are session-only — refresh the page to restore the original.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Say hi.
contact.lead: Easiest way is email — I read everything and reply within a couple of days.
contact.email_helper: For quick questions LinkedIn DMs work too. For longer conversations, just write a paragraph and I'll suggest a time.
contact.location_body:
Dnipro, Ukraine · UTC+2 (UTC+3 in summer)
Usually online 09:00–19:00 · responds same business day.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.lead: The page you're looking for has wandered off. Try the home page or browse the writing.
